title: bidens pilosa f. minor
intro: Bidens pilosa f. minor, also known as Smaller Nettle Beggarticks, is a subspecies of the Bidens pilosa plant, a type of annual or perennial herb native to Asia and Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Bidens pilosa f. minor has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and skin irritations, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
